77264929.title: 2024 IFSC Paraclimbing World Cup
77264929.extract: The IFSC Paraclimbing World Cup 2024 is the twelfth season of the paraclimbing world cup series by the International Federation of Sport Climbing. Two of the three events are held alongside the 2024 IFSC Climbing World Cup.
